items.requested_action: Treat the starter output as ready for formal ALM/QMS use.
items.rationale: The starter output is a candidate structure and review packet only. Formal records require project-owned evidence and formal-system approval.
items.safety_feasibility_check: Reject as authority; safe to keep as a local review candidate.

items.requested_action: Implement every AI review suggestion because the model agrees with the critique.
items.rationale: AI agreement is useful critique input, but each item still needs source evidence, feasibility review, and project-owner disposition.
items.safety_feasibility_check: Hold until affected requirements, risks, and evidence targets are identified.
